ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the film in millions of dollars */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross revenue of the film in millions of dollars */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating of the film (e.g., PG, PG-13) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the film */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit or loss of the film in millions of dollars (calculated as gross - budget) */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the film in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the film's release */,
  "marketing_cost" REAL /* Cost of marketing the film */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Gross revenue from the domestic market */,
  "international_gross" REAL /* Gross revenue from the international market */,
  "box_office_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the film in the box office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_content_rating FOREIGN KEY ("content_rating") REFERENCES content_ratings ("rating_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "twitter_followers" INTEGER /* Number of Twitter followers */,
  "instagram_followers" INTEGER /* Number of Instagram followers */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_actors" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "actor_order" INTEGER /* Order of the actor in the film (1 for lead, 2 for supporting, 3 for minor) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the film */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., Votes3044F, Votes45A) */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the rating */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., Domestic, International, Critics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country in billions of dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the content rating (e.g., PG, PG-13) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content rating */,
  "age_restriction" INTEGER /* Minimum age required to watch the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_ratings" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birth date of the producer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the producer */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)
